     The Numbers Business Report

Moonage Daydream (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,266,717Details
International Box Office $9,643,774
Worldwide Box Office $13,910,491
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A cinematic odyssey exploring David Bowie’s creative and musical journey. From visionary filmmaker Brett Morgen and sanctioned by the Bowie estate. Five years in the making and featuring never-before-seen footage, experience it in theaters and IMAX this Fall.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,230,145 (28.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:170 opening theaters/733 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $4,846,144

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 16th, 2022 (IMAX) by Neon
September 23rd, 2022 (Expands Wide) by Neon
December 5th, 2022 (IMAX) by Neon
International Releases: September 14th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
September 14th, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
September 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Argentina)
September 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Central America)
September 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Chile)
Video Release: Spring 2023 by Max
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual images/nudity, brief strong language and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2744 (cert #53979), 8/10/2022)
Plot point: Biography, Musicians, Singers
Social setting: Music Industry
Subgenre: Biographical Documentary
Time period setting: 1970s, 1980s, 1990s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Documentary
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
Production/Financing Companies: HBO Documentary Films, IMAX Documentary Films Capital
Production Countries: Germany, United States
Languages: English
